title: atractylis chinensis var. simplicifolia
intro: Atractylis chinensis var. simplicifolia, also known as Japanese thistle or Oriental thistle, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and analgesic effects, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Atractylis chinensis var. simplicifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
